posts.author: JoseDaher (Jose Daher)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, everyone!

It would be amazing if the text fields of the forms were formula like, so we could drop variabels (column names or functions like concatenate). This way, in a board with several different forms we would be able to set just the first one, then it’s copies would be already ok, with a change, say in the form name (the view/tab name) or board title.

Thanks for the attention,

Best regards!
